resolved_contradictions: Willingness to pay initially uncertain per Idea Validator, but Customer Discovery found established pricing at $1.50-$5/user/month across multiple vendors with 200K+ users at Geekbot alone
Market validation confirmed across all agents: $50.76B remote work tools market (23.9% CAGR), $31.62B team collaboration software, proving category viability
remaining_gaps: No conversion rate or churn metrics for incumbent solutions (Geekbot, DailyBot, Standuply) - but lack of this data from public sources is expected and doesn't change core verdict
No independent ROI studies quantifying productivity gains from AI-generated action items - absence itself signals unproven value claim
Git-based automation approach (Steady) identified as underexplored but insufficient research to validate as viable pivot direction without customer interviews
